ab: maneyran, kamyan do vaheynyo?
en: maneyran, are you home?

ab: komyan, asdepey.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: maneyran, kamyan do vahaynyo?
en: maneyran, are you home?

ab: yabo simaneyran, yaken nam, si ladang, yamyan so vazey mo? simai am, ipanci ko jya.
ch: B:maneyran不在家耶!我是ladang，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告maneyran。
en: maneyran is not at home. I am ladang. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: sino kamo?
en: Who are you?

ab: akes, yamen am si maneyran kani ladang.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是maneyran和ladang，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are maneyran and ladang, please open the door for us.

ab: sino ka?
en: Who is it?

ab: yaken am si magaga, ko kalahen si tomayo.
en: I am magaga, I am here for tomayo.

ab: akes, ko maia tomita jimo.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: ka mow neyranaya jya ni mai, ko ikapow imo.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: manpang, ko kalahen imo amey yalalam.
en: manpang, I am here to play with you.

ab: asdeprana, ko mowney ya am nanlajimo.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: oya nimowa koa wakey, akan pala!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: ya maganinam o wakey.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: sijya! oya nimowa ko asomon, akan pala.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的西瓜，吃看看。
en: Come here! This is the watermelon I grow. You should try it.

ab: ya maganinam o somon.
en: This watermelon tastes sweet.

ab: lisna jito! oya nimo wa koa tomozokosi, akan pala!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: ow! yapiya kakanan na.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: koman ka so vazacinok.
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: ko jyangan so vazacinok, koman ko so asi no kayo.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: koman ka so o ka si?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: noon, ko ikakey ori.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: atjipan ko o asi no kayo ta kanen mo.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: ayoi, yaroo asoy no asi no kayo.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: mangapko so ranom ta yopen mo.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: ayoi.
en: Thank you.

ab: pakaroonmo o kanen mo, ta yaroo ko ni dengdenga yakan.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: ow! manoyong a yamaangno yapiya so kakanan.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: pakaroonmo o kanen mo, ta yaro pa dojya.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: ko na jyamo!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: pakaroonmo o kanen mo, ta yaro pa dojya.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: jikonangan, ta yarorana ko nyakan.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
